query:
SELECT 
  usl.userId,
  u.name AS repName,
  u.email AS repEmail,
  usl.digestType,
  usl.status,
  usl.dryRun,
  usl.itemCount,
  usl.error,
  usl.sentAt,
  usl.weekKey
FROM userEmailSendLog usl
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = usl.userId
WHERE usl.digestType = 'thursday'
  AND usl.sentDate >= '2026-05-14'
ORDER BY usl.sentAt ASC;
